description: Type assertion (as SafeInput) does not sanitize tainted data. req.body flows into SQL string despite type cast.

expected.notes: req.body flows through type assertion into SQL string concat; depends on scanner tracking taint through as-expressions and no SQL sink is defined
TP: 'any' type annotation on req parameter in /update route handler
TP: 'any' type annotation on res parameter in /update route handler
